title: Gebet vor einer Vorstandssitzung | Prayer before a [synagogue] board meeting, by Lior Bar-Ami
author: Aharon N. Varady (translation)

coauthors.name: Aharon N. Varady (translation)
coauthors.bio: Aharon Varady (M.A.J.Ed./JTSA Davidson) is a volunteer translator for the Open Siddur Project. If you find any mistakes in his translations, please let him know. Shgiyot mi yavin; Ministarot Naqeni שְׁגִיאוֹת מִי־יָבִין; מִנִּסְתָּרוֹת נַקֵּנִי "Who can know all one's flaws? From hidden errors, correct me" (Psalms 19:13). If you'd like to directly support his work, please consider donating via his Patreon account. (Varady also transcribes prayers and contributes his own original work besides serving as the primary shammes for the Open Siddur Project and its website, opensiddur.org.)

coauthors.name: Lior Bar-Ami
coauthors.bio: Lior Bar-Ami is a Jewish writer and liturgical creator based in Europe. Ordained in 2016 at the Abraham Geiger College in Berlin, he previously served in rabbinic roles in France and Austria. He no longer works as a rabbi and does not identify as religious. His work has evolved toward a humanistic and spiritual expression of Jewish life, creating contemporary liturgy that centers shared humanity, ethical responsibility, memory, and solidarity. His texts seek to open reflective spaces across traditions — grounded in Jewish language and experience, yet not confined to religious doctrine.

excerpt: This prayer for setting a holy intention before a board meeting was first offered by Lior bar-Ami around 10 January 2023.
content:
Source (German) Translation (English)
Quelle aller Segen und Güte in der Welt.
Wenn wir nun zu dieser Vorstandssitzung zusammenkommen,
bitten wir Dich um Deine Führung und Weisheit,
um uns bei Entscheidungen zu helfen,
die zum Wohl der gesamten Gemeinde sind.
Wir erkennen die Vielfalt unserer Gemeinde an
und schätzen sowohl die Bewahrung alter Traditionen
als auch den Fortschritt und die Innovation.
Source of all blessings and goodness in the world,
as we gather for this board meeting,
we ask for Your guidance and wisdom
to help us make decisions
that serve the best interests of the entire congregation.
We recognize the diversity of our congregation
and value both the preservation of old traditions
and progress and innovation.
Mögen wir mit Kraft und Mut gesegnet sein, neue Wege zu suchen,
um das spirituelle und gemeinschaftliche Leben unserer Synagoge zu verbessern,
ohne dabei die reiche Geschichte und das Erbe zu vergessen, die uns an diesen Punkt gebracht haben.
Hilf uns, auf die Bedürfnisse und Wünsche aller unserer Gemeindemitglieder
zu achten und in all unseren Überlegungen freundlich, mitfühlend und verständnisvoll zu handeln.
May we be blessed with strength and courage to seek new ways
to enhance the spiritual and communal life of our synagogue,
without forgetting the rich history and heritage that have brought us to this point.
Help us to be attentive to the needs and wishes of all our congregation members
and to act with kindness, compassion, and understanding in all our deliberations.
Mögen unsere Worte und Taten von den Werten
des Respekts, der Inklusion und der sozialen Gerechtigkeit geleitet sein
und andere dazu inspirieren,
sich unseren Bemühungen anzuschließen.
May our words and actions be guided
by the values of respect, inclusion, and social justice,
and may they inspire others
to join us in our efforts.
Wir bitten Dich, dass unsere Arbeit heute
von Deiner heiligen Gegenwart geleitet wird
und dass sie nicht nur uns,
sondern auch zukünftigen Generationen Segen bringt.
Möge unsere Gemeinde weiter wachsen und gedeihen,
verbunden durch unser gemeinsames Engagement,
Dir und unseren Mitmenschen zu dienen.
We ask that our work today
be guided by Your holy presence
and that it bring blessings not only to us
but also to future generations.
May our congregation continue to grow and flourish,
united by our shared commitment
to serve You and our fellow human beings.
Adonai,
Du bist voller Segen
und herrschst über das Universum.
Durch Deine Gebote
heiligst Du uns und gibst uns die Aufgabe,
uns um die Belange unserer Gemeinde zu kümmern.
Adonai,
You are full of blessings
and reign over the universe.
Through Your commandments,
You sanctify us and entrust us with the task
of caring for the needs of our congregation.

This prayer for setting a holy intention before a board meeting was first offered by Lior bar-Ami around 10 January 2023. The English translation by Aharon Varady was made 19 April 2026.
